title: GowingBlockOutlines
body:
# Why use this mod?

With this mod, you can make blocks within a selected area glow just like entities do with the glowing outline effect. This makes it easier to highlight structures or mark important regions.
![Oooooo glowing!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/992596d952ed02fc612a2d0d20b06f228d2cc4f8_0.webp)
> If you often work on building projects, redstone contraptions, or minecraft videos, this mod can be a great visualization tool.
# Controls

Blaze Rod serves is the wand. When holding the wand, detailed operation hints will be displayed. The default GUI shortcut key is F8, and it can be changed in the key bindings menu.

# Conflicts

Before V1.2.0, there is a known rendering conflict when used with Iris shaders, but it will not cause crashes.So you don’t need to worry about stability. The mod remains fully playable and safe to use.
